---
title: "Week 8"
date: 03-21-26
description: This week looks at building Recurrent Neural Networks.
editor: source
---


## Resources

| Lecture | Slides                   | Videos  | R Code Files |
|---------|--------------------------|---------|----------|
| 1       | [Slides](../lectures/8a) | [Video](https://youtu.be/4zJD1eVyjaw) | [RNN](../lectures/R/8a.R)  |
